code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let trimmed = string.trim(s)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    while i < tokens.len()
      match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(t)
        match string.parse_int(t)
        when Some(n)
          if n > 0
            nums = list.push(nums, n)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    match list.max(nums)
    when Some(m)
      print("max=#{m}")
    when None
      print("none")
    end
  when None
    print("none")
  end
end
